meta.title: Gentleman Zadar — Barbershop
meta.description: Classic men's barbershop in the heart of Zadar. Cuts, shaves and beard grooming.

hero.title: Classic cuts. Real men's code.
hero.subtitle: Razors, scissors and a cold beer. You don't just come here for a haircut — you come here for the attitude.

about.title: A salon. Not a hairdresser.
about.body1: Gentleman started from one idea: that a man in Zadar should have a place where he feels at home. Old school, loud music, coffee or beer while you wait.
about.body2: Our barbers work the old way — straight razor, scissors and patience. No shortcuts. Every cut is built for you, not for the crowd.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: All prices in euros. Cash or card.

haircut.name: Men's haircut
haircut.desc: Classic scissor and clipper cut, wash and styling.

beard.name: Beard shave
beard.desc: Hot towel, straight razor, finishing balm.

combo.name: Cut + beard
combo.desc: The full treatment for a proper gentleman.

hotTowel.name: Hot towel shave
hotTowel.desc: The seven-step classic straight razor shave.

team.title: The guys behind the blade
team.subtitle: Five years experience minimum. Zero compromise.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Fastest by WhatsApp or phone. Or just walk in.

footer.tagline: A classic men's barbershop in Zadar.

booking.title: Book appointment
booking.subtitle: Four clicks. No signup.
booking.selectBarberSubtitle: Each one has his own style — pick whoever fits you.
booking.selectServiceSubtitle: You can add more in the shop.
booking.detailsSubtitle: We need to call you if anything changes.
booking.name: Full name
booking.notePlaceholder: Anything we should know before the appointment.
booking.successSubtitle: Booking received. We'll send an SMS confirmation.
